architectureDecision.label: Updated snapshot for archive/delete
architectureDecision.rationale: Archive and delete are field changes in planning.idea.updated full-row snapshots; no separate archived/deleted kinds in Phase 120.

readyReview.decision: Idea removals/archive via planning.idea.updated full snapshot only.

technicalBreakdown: Add planning.idea.created and planning.idea.updated with full workflow_ideas row snapshots.
Implement applier for workflow_ideas insert/update including archived/inactive fields.
Hook ideas module mutators to canonical publish path.
Add ideas + hydrate integration tests including archive via updated event.

acceptanceCriteria: Idea create and update commands publish planning.idea.* events under git-event-log.
Archive/delete/inactive transitions publish planning.idea.updated with full snapshot (no separate deleted kind).
Hydrate restores workflow_ideas rows on a second machine.
No duplicate ideas on idempotent command replay.
